problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to or, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
